subject: M crashing when denoising
body:
Hi all,

I'm currently processing a dataset in Relion/M and I'm getting a crash in 
the final stage of the refinement where the denoising is applied to the 
maps. It throws out the error below and seems to happen regardless of the 
refinement settings used. I've already processed it once with some binning 
(5Apx) and it worked fine, then I re-extracted and reprocessed in Relion 
unbinned (2.1Apx). My current best guess is that I'm running out of GPU 
memory due to the large box size (we have a workstation with two 2080Tis) 
but if anyone can shed some light on the error that would be incredibly 
helpful.

Cheers,

Mat

System.Runtime.InteropServices.SEHException (0x80004005): External 
component has thrown an exception.
   at TorchSharp.NN.UNet3D.THSNN_UNet3D_forward(HType module, IntPtr tensor)
   at TorchSharp.NN.UNet3D.Forward(TorchTensor tensor) in 
D:\Dev\warp5\TorchSharp\NN\UNet3D.cs:line 18
   at Warp.NoiseNet3DTorch.<Predict>b__37_0(Int32 i, Int32 threadID) in 
D:\Dev\warp5\WarpLib\NNModels\NoiseNet3DTorch.cs:line 271
   at Warp.Tools.Helper.ForCPU(Int32 fromInclusive, Int32 toExclusive, 
Int32 nThreads, Action`1 funcSetup, Action`2 funcIterator, Action`1 
funcTeardown)
   at Warp.NoiseNet3DTorch.Predict(Image data, Image& prediction) in

Int32 threadID) in D:\Dev\warp5\WarpLib\NNModels\NoiseNet3DTorch.cs:line 800
   at Warp.Tools.Helper.ForCPU(Int32 fromInclusive, Int32 toExclusive, 
Int32 nThreads, Action`1 funcSetup, Action`2 funcIterator, Action`1 
funcTeardown)
   at Warp.NoiseNet3DTorch.Denoise(Image noisy, NoiseNet3DTorch[] networks) 
in D:\Dev\warp5\WarpLib\NNModels\NoiseNet3DTorch.cs:line 782
   at Warp.Sociology.Species.CalculateResolutionAndFilter(Single 
fixedResolution, Action`1 progressCallback, Int32 gpuID) in 
D:\Dev\warp5\WarpLib\Sociology\Species.cs:line 1655
   at Warp.Sociology.Species.FinishRefinement(Int32 gpuID) in 
D:\Dev\warp5\WarpLib\Sociology\Species.cs:line 2078
   at WarpWorker.Program.Main(String[] args) in 
D:\Dev\warp5\WarpWorker\Program.cs:line 339
